---
title: "Environment & API Diagnostics"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, Markdown, display

_candidates = [Path("quarto-data/diagnostics.json"), Path("../quarto-data/diagnostics.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "quarto-data/diagnostics.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --all-reports"
    )

d = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{d['group']['url']}" target="_blank">{d['group']['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>Environment and API compatibility check — software versions, REST/GraphQL capabilities,
label validation, and overall report compatibility assessment.</p>
""")
```

```{python}
display(Markdown(d["content"]))
```

```{python}
display(Markdown(f"> {d['verdict_md']}"))
```
